holdings.infoBox: CHRI is an equity ETF with a total of 468 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.89%, Apple at 6.88%, Microsoft at 4.58%, Amazon.com at 3.75%, and Alphabet at 3.45%.

overview.description: The Global X S&P 500 Christian Values ETF (CHRI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Christian Values Screened index. The fund is passively managed to provide the exposure of the S&P 500 Index, with the components screened using faith-based criteria. The index is weighted based on a modified market-cap to match the sector weightings of the original index. CHRI was launched on Sep 23, 2025 and is issued by Global X.
